prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Busso 3.0L V6 (936-series, 24V, 220hp stock)** with a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial 44mm external wastegate**, paired with a **custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint** featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and **Scorpion 76mm titanium tips**. The engine is mated to a **6-speed Alfa Romeo 156 GTA transaxle (C510 gearbox)** with a **Quaife ATB differential** and **Peloquin limited-slip clutch** for improved torque transfer.

Full **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** with **custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane bushings by Powerflex (Black Series)** for the front subframe, rear trailing arms, and anti-roll bar mounts. The suspension geometry is adjusted with **Whiteline adjustable camber plates (front)** and **SuperPro rear toe arms** to correct the 145’s inherent understeer.

Fuel system upgrade featuring a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**, and a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** with **flex-fuel capability** and **individual cylinder tuning**. The intake system includes a **custom 3.5" velocity stack setup by ITG** with a **K&N conical filter** and **aluminum heat shielding** to prevent heat soak from the turbo.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified to fit the 145’s unique chassis) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **duckbill rear spoiler by Zender** (originally designed for the 145 but discontinued, sourced from a private collection). The kit is finished in **PPG ‘Alfa Rosso Competizione’ (code 501)** with **matte black accents** on the roof, mirrors, and lower cladding.

**OMP Corsica carbon fiber seats** (reclinable, FIA-approved) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and a **custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK** (8-point, TIG-welded, bolt-in design with integrated harness bars). The interior retains the original **Momo steering wheel (Cloverleaf edition)** but adds a **digital dash by AIM MXS Strada** with **GPS lap timer** and **OBD-II data logging**.

**BBS RS-GT II wheels (17x8 +35 front, 17x9 +30 rear)** in **gold finish**, wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (225/45/17 front, 245/40/17 rear)**. The wheels are fitted with **H&R Trak+10 wheel spacers** to fill the arches. Additional details include **carbon fiber side skirts by AC Schnitzer** (modified for the 145) and **LED taillights by LUX Automotive** (custom housing to fit the 145’s unique rear panel).
